violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (floor mixer and ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The following areas were observed in poor repair: - walk-in cooler door gasket - 1 door freezer door gasket - freezer chest door hinges - 2 door refrigerator (61 F) - service has been called. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: - walk-in cooler light bulb - walk-in cooler door - walk-in cooler floor The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
Cutting board was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and shelving above three bay sink to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
The kitchen floor was observed with missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
